name: Simple Chocolate Truffles
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Cream cheese (one large package or 3 small packages)
Assorted toppings (cocoa, powdered sugar, crushed nuts, jimmies, etc.)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix 2/3 cup of the powdered sugar into the softened cream cheese until well blended.
2. Add the remaining powdered sugar to the cream cheese mixture in additional 2/3 cup increments, ensuring everything is thoroughly combined after each addition.
3. Melt the chocolate in a double boiler and stir it into the cream cheese mixture along with the vanilla extract.
4. Chill the mixture for several hours until firm.
5. Roll the chilled mixture into one-inch balls.
6. Coat the balls in the desired topping (cocoa, powdered sugar, crushed nuts, jimmies, etc.).
7. Chill again before serving.
NOTES:
Easy-to-make candies with chocolate and cream cheese -- Here's a good recipe for lazy chocolate freaks. They're not as good as the ones you buy in good candy stores, but they're still yummy.
If you're adventurous, try substituting the liqueur of your choice for the vanilla extract.
